title: milium esculentum
intro: Milium esculentum, also known as millet, is a type of annual grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Milium esculentum include its ability to help lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, Milium esculentum is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
